summary: Iteration 2 full re-test (backend + frontend) for Dutyee portfolio after Hero portrait, About, Achievements, Education, Skills sections, expanded Timeline, ScrollProgress, and phone-number removal. Backend 9/9 pytest tests pass. Frontend: Hero renders with portrait (customer-assets URL, 898px loaded) + 'Prashant Kumar.' title + 'APAC Business Development Leader / Bridging OT and IT' tagline. All 7 sections render (about, pillars, achievements, timeline, skills, education, contact). Counts verified: 4 pillars, 6 achievements, 9 timeline rows, 4 skill groups, 4 education + 4 certifications, 9 video cards linking to LinkedIn with target=_blank, 6 article cards. Scroll progress bar grows on scroll (0% -> 5.69% after 600px). Phone number ('+65 9391 4327' / '93914327') NOT visible in body text on /, /videos or /articles (confirmed via regex + substring scan). WhatsApp href correctly contains wa.me/6593914327. Email href is mailto:prashantkumar18@gmail.com. Contact form submit -> backend POST /api/contact -> success state shown. Zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 87 references `logger` inside create_contact_message but `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` is defined at line 114 (module bottom). Works at runtime due to module-level evaluation, but fragile ordering — consider moving logging setup above the routes (unchanged from iteration 1).
Pillars.jsx metrics strip still shows '60%+ · 95% · Top 40 · 550+' — intentional per agent-to-agent context (these are content/influencer stats, not phone-related).
Contact endpoint has no rate limiting or spam protection — fine for portfolio but worth noting.
About.jsx and Hero.jsx both hard-code the same PORTRAIT URL — minor DRY nit; consider extracting to a shared constants file if reused more.
ScrollProgress uses inline width style with 80ms CSS transition — smooth and performant; no issues.
All interactive/critical elements have data-testid attributes — good testability.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all checks pass: portrait loaded, all sections present, counts correct, phone absent, contact form end-to-end OK, videos/articles routes work, zero console errors)

test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Contact messages created via tests: TEST_John, TEST_Jane, TEST_Persist, TEST_E2E — all in db.contact_messages collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests: /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py (pytest, 9 tests). Frontend data-testids used in tests: hero-title, hero-portrait, scroll-progress, about-section, pillars-section, achievements-section, timeline-section, skills-section, education-section, contact-section, pillar-card-{0..3}, achievement-{0..5}, timeline-row-{0..8}, skill-group-{0..3}, education-{0..3}, certification-{0..3}, contact-whatsapp, contact-email, contact-linkedin, contact-input-{name,email,company,message}, contact-submit, contact-success, footer-whatsapp, videos-title, video-card-{0..8}, articles-title, article-card-{0..5}. Phone number regex patterns to check: '\+65\s*9391\s*4327', '\b93914327\b'. WhatsApp href MUST contain wa.me/6593914327 (this is the only allowed place the digits appear).
